name: Chocolate Coconut Balls
recipeIngredient: 3 oz. HERSHEY'S Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (3-1/4 cup)
1/2 cup sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan over very low heat, melt the chocolate and butter. Add the sweetened condensed milk; stir to blend. Remove from heat.
2. In a small saucepan, stir together the granulated sugar, water, and corn syrup. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar is dissolved. Continue cooking without stirring until the mixture reaches 250°F on a candy thermometer or forms a firm ball when dropped into very cold water (the bulb of the thermometer should not rest on the bottom of the saucepan).
3. Remove from heat; stir into the chocolate mixture. Add vanilla, coconut, and nuts; stir until well blended.
4. Refrigerate about 30 minutes or until firm enough to handle. Shape into 1-inch balls; roll in powdered sugar. Store tightly covered in a cool, dry place. Approximately 5 dozen candies.
Note: For best results, do not double this recipe.
